Document
  └─ row
     └─ grid-item
        ├─ paragraph
        │  ├─ icon props={name="user"}
        │  ├─ text "\nJohn Doe "
        │  └─ badge "Admin" props={variant="warning"}
        └─ container[button-group]
           ├─ button "Edit"
           └─ button "Remove" props={classes=["danger"]}
